category_sources: Official Minisign documentation describes file signing and verification at https://jedisct1.github.io/minisign/.
source_facts.description says it signs files and verifies signatures.
display_name_sources: Official documentation page heading uses Minisign.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation is linked from the project and contains usage, key generation, signature format, and installation details.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/jedisct1/minisign, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official documentation says Minisign uses Ed25519 and documents sign/verify CLI commands.
